deployment_config.description: Configuration for deploying the endpoint, including settings for rollback and traffic shifting during updates.
deployment_config.type: list(object({auto_rollback_configuration: list(object({alarms: list(object({alarm_name: string}))})),blue_green_update_policy: list(object({maximum_execution_timeout_in_seconds: optional(number),termination_wait_in_seconds: optional(number),traffic_routing_configuration: list(object({type: string,wait_interval_in_seconds: number,canary_size: list(object({type: string,value: number})),linear_step_size: list(object({type: string,value: number}))}))})),rolling_update_policy: list(object({maximum_execution_timeout_in_seconds: optional(number),wait_interval_in_seconds: number,maximum_batch_size: list(object({type: string,value: number})),rollback_maximum_batch_size: list(object({type: string,value: number}))}))}))

endpoint_config_name.description: Name of the endpoint configuration to use for the SageMaker endpoint; must match an existing configuration.

name.description: Specifies the unique name for the SageMaker endpoint; must be between 1 and 63 characters and can include alphanumeric characters and hyphens.

tags.description: Key-value pairs to categorize and organize the endpoint, supporting resource identification and management; must adhere to AWS tag naming conventions.
